title: Hero landing page
description: Polished headless landing page: full hero with imagery, feature grid, how-it-works split, testimonial, and a call-to-action panel. Works in dark and light mode, on web and mobile. Import it, then swap the copy, images, and button targets in the page editor.
_comment: Landing/hero template built only from core styles (issue: beautiful importable landing pages). The page is HEADLESS: it renders without the site header/footer, so it works as a guest/logged-out landing or onboarding page. Buttons point at the system 'register' and 'login' pages via page_keyword; change them in the editor. Images are curated Unsplash URLs - replace with your own assets for production. Content ships in the default-install locales de-CH and en-GB.

translations.content: Landingpage-Vorlage mit Hero, Funktionsübersicht und Call-to-Action – gebaut aus Kern-Styles.
Landing page template with hero, feature overview, and call-to-action – built from core styles.
